name: Prophet (Meta)
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT); Meta project; no API costs

performance.notes: Fitting takes seconds to minutes depending on series length and seasonalities; prediction fast

agent_readiness.notes: Meta's time series forecasting library designed for business forecasting. Decomposable model: trend + seasonality + holidays. Pandas DataFrame input. Automatic detection of changepoints. Custom seasonalities and holiday effects. Uncertainty intervals. Cross-validation utilities. R and Python APIs. Designed for non-experts with interpretable components. Best for business metrics with strong seasonal patterns (daily/weekly/yearly).

gotchas: Underperforms on complex multivariate series (designed for univariate)
PySTAN dependency can cause installation issues
Changepoint prior scale requires tuning for volatile series
best_when: Business KPI forecasting (revenue, traffic, sales) with seasonal patterns
Forecasting by non-ML-experts who need interpretable models
Series with multiple seasonalities (weekly + yearly) and holiday effects
Batch forecasting across many similar time series
avoid_when: Multivariate forecasting with many correlated series
When deep learning temporal models (N-BEATS, TFT) are needed for accuracy
summary: Prophet is Meta's time series forecasting library designed for business forecasting. Decomposes series into trend + seasonality + holidays. Pandas-native API designed for non-ML-experts. Automatic changepoint detection, custom holidays, uncertainty intervals. Best for business metrics (revenue, traffic) with strong seasonal patterns. Interpretable components. Underperforms on complex multivariate series.
